title: draba cinerea var. arctica
intro: Draba cinerea var. arctica, also known as Arctic Whitlowgrass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Arctic regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Arctic Whitlowgrass has been prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or poultice, and can be found in some herbal remedies, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
